items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic re-check before service, specifically 72 hours prior to the appointment. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether this re-check was implemented or executed. The linked use case mentions the need for an automatic re-check, but there is no direct evidence showing that this functionality is in place or functioning as required.
